items.html: Now, these MaNTzePaChs are discernments of Gevurot that she takes from Bina, as is known, for from there they are drawn; and she is called "walls," and this is the secret of Hotam [seal], as above. It is known that the NHY [Netzah-Hod-Yesod] of Bina, in which the Mochin of ZA [Zeir Anpin] are placed, are three names Ehyeh: one filled with Yods in Netzah, one with Alephs in Hod, and one with Hehs in Yesod; and the three of them in Gematria are 455 [TaNaH], which is the Gematria of Hotam. And this is the discernment of the Malchut in the Nukva [female], which is the first seal, whose entire essence is from the clothings of NHY of Ima.
